title: message queueclusterconfigurationmonitoringstandard
content:
# message queueconfiguration ## RabbitMQcluster
- ：3.12.10
- node：3rabbit-01, rabbit-02, rabbit-03
- nodememory：1.5GB
- ：0.8memory80% ### queueconfiguration
- order-queue: durable=true, maxLength=100000, consumerexpected6
- payment-queue: durable=true, messageTTL=30000ms, deadLetterExchange=payment-dlx
- payment-dlq: queue，normal0
- audit-queue: durable=true, autoAck=truerisk ## Kafkacluster
- ：3.6.0
- Broker：3
- notification-events: partitions=3, replication-factor=2
- consumer: notify-consumer-group, instance=3 ## monitoringthreshold
- queue: >5000recordsalertorder/payment
- consumerlag: >5000recordsalertKafka
- queue: >100recordsalert
- : ->1%alert
